header.title: AI Configuration
header.subtitle: Control the customer WhatsApp bot through a structured configuration. The final system prompt is generated dynamically from everything below — no code required.
header.masterOn: The bot is ON. It answers customers per the Audience and When-to-Answer rules below.
header.masterOff: The bot is OFF. No customer messages are auto-answered, regardless of other settings.

errors.load: Failed to load AI configuration. Admin access required.

common.noneYet: None yet — add your first below.

easy.title: Your AI Assistant
easy.subtitle: Set up how your assistant talks to customers on WhatsApp. No technical knowledge needed — fill in what you can, then press Test to try it.

welcome.title: Welcome message
welcome.subtitle: The first thing a new customer sees when they message you.

services.title: Services & products
services.subtitle: Tell the assistant what you offer. It will only talk about what you add here.
services.more: More business info — about, FAQs, policies, hours…

howItAnswers.title: How it answers
howItAnswers.subtitle: The assistant's personality and the way it writes replies.
howItAnswers.more: Fine-tuning — writing style, AI model, advanced limits

flow.title: Conversation flow
flow.subtitle: How the assistant guides the chat and moves customers toward a sale.

rules.title: Rules & boundaries
rules.subtitle: Control what the assistant must always do, never do, and when to pass the chat to a person.
rules.handoffTitle: Pass the chat to a human

when.title: When & who it replies to
when.subtitle: Choose when the assistant is active and which customers it answers.

expert.title: Expert
expert.subtitle: Optional. Replace the entire generated prompt with your own wording.

welcome.messageHint: Shown on the assistant's very first reply in a new chat.
welcome.messagePlaceholder: e.g. Hi! 👋 Thanks for messaging {{company_name}}. How can we help you today?
welcome.exact: Send only the welcome on first message
welcome.exactDesc: On: the first message sends just this welcome. Off: it sends this welcome and then also answers what the customer asked. Either way the welcome is sent exactly as written.
welcome.varsHint: Tip: use {{customer_name}} and {{company_name}} — they're filled in automatically.

templatesModal.title: Start from a ready-made setup
templatesModal.subtitle: Pick a starting point, then customize everything below. This fills the fields for you.

general.title: General Settings
general.modelHint: Provider ({{provider}}) & API key are managed in AI Chatbot settings.
general.temperatureHint: How random the wording is. Low = the bot answers the same way every time (safe, predictable). High = more varied, less repetitive — but also less consistent. For business support, keep it low (0.1–0.4).
general.creativityHint: How much the bot improvises vs. sticks to your company info and scripts. Low = stays strictly on facts and your provided answers. High = freer, more expressive and persuasive phrasing. (This adds a guideline to the prompt — separate from Temperature, which is the model's raw randomness.)

audience.title: Audience — Which Customers
audience.desc: Decide exactly which customers the bot is allowed to answer.
audience.who: Who should the bot reply to?
audience.noteAll: The bot replies to every conversation (a human handoff or a per-chat override still wins).
audience.noteRules: The bot replies only to contacts that pass every rule below.
audience.includeTagsEmpty: No tags exist yet. Create tags under Contacts to target by tag.
audience.newNote: "New" means this is the customer's first inbound message.
audience.overrideDesc: When on, the Auto/On/Off switch on an individual conversation overrides these rules for that chat.

whenToAnswer.title: When to Answer
whenToAnswer.desc: Time, rate, and pause controls for when the bot replies.
whenToAnswer.onlyDuringHoursDesc: Outside these hours the bot stays silent (or sends the off-hours message below).
whenToAnswer.offHoursHint: optional — leave empty to stay silent
whenToAnswer.offHoursPlaceholder: e.g. Thanks for reaching out! We'll reply during business hours.
whenToAnswer.ignoreFirstDesc: Skip the very first inbound message in a conversation (let a human greet first).
whenToAnswer.fallbackHint: sent if the AI errors or returns nothing — leave empty to stay silent
whenToAnswer.pauseOnHuman: Pause when a human agent replies
whenToAnswer.pauseOnHumanDesc: Stops the bot when a teammate sends a message in the chat.
whenToAnswer.pauseDurationHint: how long the bot stays paused after a human reply

personality.title: Personality
personality.desc: How the assistant sounds and feels.
personality.dialectHint: how it speaks when replying in Arabic
personality.personaHint: describe who the bot is — it will act this part
personality.personaPlaceholder: e.g. A calm, expert Saudi sales advisor named Sara who is warm, confident, and never pushy. Speaks like a real person, uses light Saudi expressions, and always tries to help the customer choose the right product.
personality.writingStylePlaceholder: e.g. Short, warm, and to the point.

businessRules.title: Business Rules
businessRules.desc: Hard rules the bot must always follow. Add as many as you need.
businessRules.placeholder: Add a rule and press Enter…

company.title: Company Knowledge
company.desc: The bot's single source of truth. Anything you leave blank is omitted.
company.name: Company Name

products.title: Products
products.desc: What the business sells. Add each product in both languages with its options and prices — the bot will only offer what's listed here.
products.includeLabel: Include products in the bot's knowledge
products.includeOn: The catalog below is added to the prompt.
products.includeOff: Disabled — products are not sent to the bot.
products.empty: No products yet — add your first one below.
products.optionsEmpty: No options (e.g. sizes, add-ons). Add some if this product has variants.

sales.title: Sales Configuration
sales.desc: How the bot guides customers toward conversion.

conversation.title: Conversation Rules
conversation.desc: Structure and etiquette for every reply.
conversation.maxSentences: Maximum Number of Sentences (0 = no limit)

safety.title: Safety System
safety.desc: Guardrails that keep the bot on-topic and safe.
safety.businessOnlyDesc: Decline anything unrelated to your business.
safety.escalationDesc: Hand off when the bot can't safely help.

handoff.title: Human Handoff
handoff.desc: When to stop the bot and transfer to a human agent.
handoff.transferMessageHint: sent to the customer on handoff
handoff.transferMessagePlaceholder: e.g. One moment — I'm connecting you with a team member.

memory.title: Memory Configuration
memory.desc: What the bot remembers within a conversation.

variables.title: Dynamic Variables
variables.desc: Use these tokens anywhere — they're replaced at send time.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.rawOverrideHint: if set, replaces the entire generated prompt
advanced.rawOverridePlaceholder: Leave empty to use the generated prompt. Variables still work here.
advanced.activeWarning: Override is active. All structured sections above are ignored until you clear this field.

templates.title: Templates
templates.desc: Apply a ready-made business preset, then customize and save.

playground.title: Testing Playground
playground.subtitle: Tests the current (unsaved) configuration against the live model.
playground.empty: Send a test message to see how the bot responds.

bot.title: Customer AI Bot
bot.subtitle: Your 24/7 WhatsApp representative. This is the single place to control how it talks, what it knows, who it answers, and when.
bot.masterHintOn: Answering customers automatically, following the rules below.
bot.masterHintOff: Not answering anyone. Turn this on to let the bot reply.
bot.loadError: Failed to load the bot configuration. Admin access required.
bot.testEmptySub: See exactly how your bot responds
bot.testPlaceholder: Type a message as a customer…
bot.testNote: The test uses your current unsaved settings. Save to apply them to the live bot.

connection.title: AI Connection
connection.subtitle: The AI provider and key that power the bot.

identity.title: Identity & Voice
identity.subtitle: Who the bot is and how it sounds.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.subtitle: The first thing a new customer sees.

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.subtitle: What the bot knows and is allowed to talk about.

flow.title: Conversation & Sales
flow.subtitle: How it guides chats and moves customers to a result.

rules.title: Rules & Safety
rules.subtitle: What it must always do, and never do.

audience.title: Who It Answers
audience.subtitle: Choose which customers the bot replies to.

handoff.title: Human Handoff
handoff.subtitle: When to stop the bot and pass the chat to a person.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.subtitle: AI model, memory, variables and raw prompt override.

connection.providerNote: Shared by every AI feature in the system.
connection.keyMissing: No key set — the bot cannot reply until you add one
connection.geminiKeyHint: Free key from {{url}} — used as the primary, with Groq as automatic fallback.
connection.geminiKeyMissing: Optional — add it to use Gemini's free tier first
connection.routingNote: Smart routing is automatic: the bot uses Gemini first, then falls back to Groq if a limit is hit. Lead qualification and the CRM assistant run on separate free lanes so nothing competes for the same quota.

routing.title: Which model each feature uses
routing.hint: Tried left → right. The first healthy free model answers; if it hits a limit, the next one takes over automatically.

bot.alwaysDoHint: the bot follows these in every reply
bot.neverTopicsHint: forbidden topics, no matter how the customer asks

salesModes.offDesc: Answer questions only — no sales push
salesModes.hardDesc: Lead every chat toward a purchase
